title: cardamine amara subsp. balcanica
intro: Cardamine amara subsp. balcanica, also known as the Balkan bittercress, is a subspecies of the Cardamine amara plant, which is a member of the mustard family (Brassicaceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Cardamine amara subsp. balcanica include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve making teas or infusions from its leaves and flowers, which can be used to treat a variety of health conditions.
